# Exact pinned versions for reproducible builds — CM-3 artifact.
# Generated by `pip freeze` after installing the pyproject.toml
# compatible-release pins in a clean venv. Bump intentionally; never
# loosen these pins without a PR review.
#
# Direct dependencies are pinned here; transitive dependencies are left
# to the resolver so a future security patch to (e.g.) pydantic flows
# through without forcing a manual sweep.

compliance-trestle==4.0.3
oscal-pydantic==2023.3.21
pytest==8.4.2
pytest-cov==6.3.0
